name: tandem_verify
short_description: TCL task to verify Tandem Stage-1 PDIs
full_help:
tandem_verify

Description: 
TCL task to verify Tandem Stage-1 PDIs

Syntax: 
tandem_verify  -reference_dcp <arg> -untrusted_dcp <arg> [-full_check <arg>]
               [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  -reference_dcp  Path to trusted reference DCP file
  -untrusted_dcp  Path to untrusted DCP file
  [-full_check]   Default behavior is to report the first difference only; if
                  this option is set to true, tandem_verify will report 
                  complete differences
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: Path to trusted reference DCP file
